title: minuartia glomerata subsp. cymifera
intro: Minuartia glomerata subsp. cymifera, also known as Alpine Pearlwort, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Alpine Pearlwort include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antiseptic and antifungal properties. Alpine Pearlwort can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can be used in salves or creams to harness its medicinal properties.
